name_en: Code: 665718 Mini 🏆[MCM] Classic: Side double row of studs. Made of our iconic Visetos coated canvas. Features luxurious sheepskin lining 🐑. Interior has a tablet 💻 pocket. YKK zipper. Copper plate with independent code 🔢 not repeated.
